title: hieracium praecox subsp. horripilum
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. horripilum, also known as early hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium praecox subsp. horripilum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Hieracium praecox subsp. horripilum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
